name: Fajita Marinade (Pkgk86b)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the seasoning mix, salt (6 tablespoons), ground pepper (1 1/2 teaspoons), chili powder (1 1/3 teaspoons), garlic powder (3/4 teaspoon), and cumin (3/4 teaspoon). Mix well and store in a jar until ready to use.
2. Place the marinade in a shallow dish or resealable plastic bag.
3. Add the skirt steak (or other suitable beef cut) to the marinade, ensuring it is fully coated.
4. Cover the container with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 8 hours, preferably overnight, to allow the flavors to penetrate the meat.
5. When ready to cook, remove the meat from the marinade and pat dry with paper towels before grilling or sautéing.
